top_signals.title: After Biden Denied Alabama Coal Waste Bid, Trump Reverses Course
top_signals.summary: The Environmental Protection Agency on Monday proposed to approve Alabama’s application to take over issuing certain coal waste permits from the agency, part of a trend under President Donald Trump to transfer more authority from the federal government to states.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Andy Burnham tells Labour MPs he will rein in Britain’s outsourcing industry
top_signals.summary: PM-in-waiting tells hustings he will appoint a ‘broad church’ ministerial team and bring government contracts in-house
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
